components.name: Accordion
components.packageImport: import { Accordion, AccordionContent, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/Accordion';
useWhen: A sectioned disclosure list needs keyboard-accessible expand/collapse behavior
FAQ, settings, or docs content should stay on one page
One or multiple panels can be open using Radix Accordion semantics
avoidWhen: A single disclosure is enough; use Collapsible
The content is primary navigation; use Side Nav Section
Opening a panel should route to another page
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic
Motion that bypasses MotionProvider or prefers-reduced-motion

props.type: Use single for one open item, multiple for independent open items.
props.collapsible: Allow the active single item to close when the content is optional.
props.AccordionItem: Requires a stable value for Radix state.
props.AccordionTrigger: Visible section title and full hit target.
props.AccordionContent: Panel body. Keep product copy supplied by the app.
props.motion: Optional boolean. Defaults to the MotionProvider policy and disables this component pattern when false.

ai.arabicFriendly: Trigger text uses start alignment and indicator sits at inline-end. In dir="rtl", spacing and hit target must mirror without left/right CSS.

components.name: Account Status
useWhen: Showing a signed-in user, workspace, or account status in Top Nav or Side Nav
A compact identity row needs Avatar plus label and optional description
Collapsed side navigation should keep the avatar visible while hiding text
avoidWhen: Decorative fake people are needed
A logo or product mark should use brand assets instead
A full profile card or account menu is required
neverInvent: Fake user identity or status copy
Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.avatar: Optional custom Avatar node. Prefer the design-system Avatar component.
props.avatarAlt: Accessible text for the fallback avatar when avatar is not supplied.
props.label: Required account, user, workspace, or organization label.
props.description: Optional status, plan, role, or workspace metadata.
props.endContent: Optional trailing status or menu affordance.

ai.usage: Use AccountStatus in Top Nav or Side Nav footer. Keep background transparent by default and let the parent surface own framing.

components.name: Alert
useWhen: Inline status or system notices need to be announced
A warning or destructive state should stay in context
Feedback should not block the user
avoidWhen: A blocking confirmation is required; use Alert Dialog
The message is purely decorative
The notice needs product-specific localization rules inside the component
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.variant: Use default, info, success, warning, or destructive. The variant selects the default icon and tokenized status emphasis.
props.showIcon: Defaults to true. Set false for text-only alerts when nearby UI already communicates the status.
props.icon: Optional ReactNode override. Prefer semantic, non-directional lucide icons unless the alert meaning requires direction.
props.tone: Backward-compatible alias for variant. Prefer variant in new code.
props.AlertDescription: Supporting details; product owns wording and localization.

ai.arabicFriendly: Use logical spacing and product-supplied localized copy. Mixed Arabic/English text must wrap without overlapping action or icon slots.

components.name: Alert Dialog
components.packageImport: import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogTrigger } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/AlertDialog';
useWhen: Destructive confirmations
Irreversible decisions
Blocking choices that require explicit acknowledgement and focus trapping
avoidWhen: Inline status would be enough
The action can be undone without confirmation
The dialog copy is not localized or verified
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic
Motion that bypasses MotionProvider or prefers-reduced-motion

props.AlertDialogTrigger: Use asChild with Button for visible trigger controls.
props.AlertDialogContent: Modal content with overlay and semantic surface tokens.
props.AlertDialogAction: Confirmed action; pair destructive wording with product-approved copy.
props.motion: Optional boolean. Defaults to the MotionProvider policy and disables this component pattern when false.

ai.arabicFriendly: Footer, text alignment, and modal centering use logical properties. Do not invent Arabic confirmation copy; use supplied localization.

components.name: Aspect Ratio
useWhen: Media frames need stable dimensions before assets load
Gallery, thumbnail, video, and preview regions need fixed ratios
AI-generated templates need layout stability without viewport-based type scaling
avoidWhen: Content height is unknown and should grow naturally
A responsive grid should own the sizing instead
Text-only cards need normal content flow
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.ratio: Number such as 16 / 9, 4 / 3, or 1. Use constants or expressions, not raw string dimensions.

ai.arabicFriendly: Aspect ratio is direction-neutral. Content inside still needs dir="rtl" checks for text, controls, and media captions.

components.name: Attachment
components.packageImport: import { Attachment, AttachmentAction, AttachmentActions, AttachmentContent, AttachmentDescription, AttachmentGroup, AttachmentMedia, AttachmentTitle, AttachmentTrigger } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/Attachment';
useWhen: Files or generated artifacts need a compact preview row
An upload, processing, error, or done state needs semantic status styling
A file attachment needs title, description, media, actions, trigger, or grouped layout primitives
avoidWhen: A full file manager or product-specific upload workflow is required
File validation, storage, or localization rules belong in product logic
Decorative fake files are being generated
neverInvent: Fake product file names in production examples
Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.orientation: Use horizontal for rows and vertical for stacked previews.
props.progress: Optional 0-100 progress value for uploading or processing states. Product code owns upload math and state changes.
props.size: Use default for normal rows, sm/xs for dense lists.
props.state: Use idle, uploading, processing, error, or done; do not invent custom visual states.
props.AttachmentMedia: Leading media slot for file icon, image thumbnail, spinner, or generated artifact preview. Use variant="image" for thumbnails.
props.AttachmentContent: Text content wrapper containing title and description.
props.AttachmentActions: Inline-end action group for open, remove, retry, or download actions.
props.AttachmentTrigger: Dashed add/upload trigger; product owns file input behavior.

ai.arabicFriendly: Use AttachmentMedia at inline-start and AttachmentActions at inline-end. In dir="rtl", action placement, progress, image cards, and truncation must mirror through logical layout. Do not invent Arabic file names or production copy.

components.name: Avatar
components.packageImport: import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarGroup, AvatarImage, AvatarOverflow, AvatarStatusDot } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/DataDisplay';
useWhen: People or account identifiers
Team member references with fallback initials
Entity identity where alt text is known
A compact team stack needs an overflow count
avoidWhen: Decorative profile filler
Unverified fake people
A logo or product mark should be used instead
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.alt: Required when src is provided. Use localized, factual identity text; do not invent a fake person.
props.children: Default visual fallback. Prefer initials or a short entity mark when no verified image exists.
props.size: xs, sm, md, or lg. Use sm in dense groups, md for account rows, lg for profile previews.
props.src: Optional verified image URL. Avatar must still render the fallback when the image fails.
props.status: Optional online, busy, away, or offline indicator. Status dot is decorative and mirrors with inline-end.
props.AvatarGroup: Groups multiple avatars with logical overlap and requires an aria-label.
props.AvatarOverflow: Use for localized remaining count such as +3 or +٣. Match its size to grouped avatars.
props.AvatarStatusDot: Internal status indicator; prefer the status prop unless composing a custom avatar.

ai.arabicFriendly: Default to initials/fallback when a culturally appropriate verified image is unavailable. Use Arabic initials or localized short labels, logical overlap, inline-end status dots, and Arabic numerals for overflow counts in dir="rtl". Do not fabricate Arabic names or people.

components.name: Badge
useWhen: Short status
Taxonomy
Type markers
Unread counts
Compact metadata
avoidWhen: Full sentences
Pure decoration
Primary actions
Unlocalized status copy
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.variant: Semantic visual role. Use default, secondary, destructive, outline, success, info, or warning.
props.size: Compact sizing role. Use sm, md, or lg; do not use size to fix long copy.
props.startContent: Optional inline-start content such as a non-directional icon.
props.endContent: Optional inline-end content such as a localized count.
props.children: Short visible label from product copy or localization.

rules: Use Badge for short status, taxonomy, and compact metadata only.
Do not hardcode raw Utopia colors inside Badge usage.
Use semantic variants instead of one-off classes.
Keep labels short enough to avoid truncation in dense navigation or tables.
ai.arabicFriendly: Badge must support dir="rtl", logical start/end slots, Arabic numerals for counts, IBM Plex Sans Arabic through theme typography tokens, and localized short labels. Do not invent Arabic production copy.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.packageImport: import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbEllipsis, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/Navigation';
useWhen: A deep page needs parent-page context
Users need to understand where the current resource sits in a hierarchy
A long path may need collapsed middle items or an overflow menu
avoidWhen: Primary navigation is needed; use Top Nav, Side Nav, or Navigation Menu
A single-level page has no parent context
The UI is a wizard or progress flow; use steps/progress patterns
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.aria-label: Required localized label for the breadcrumb navigation landmark.
props.Breadcrumb: Root nav landmark. Keep aria-label descriptive and localized when needed.
props.BreadcrumbList: Ordered list wrapper for breadcrumb items and separators.
props.BreadcrumbItem: List item wrapper for link, current page, or collapsed menu trigger.
props.BreadcrumbLink: Clickable ancestor link. Use a router link only through composition.
props.BreadcrumbSeparator: Visual separator. Use non-directional slash by default or mirror directional chevrons in RTL.
props.BreadcrumbEllipsis: Collapsed middle path indicator. Pair with a menu when hidden parents need discovery.

ai.arabicFriendly: Breadcrumb order, separator spacing, dropdown alignment, and focus rings must follow dir="rtl" using logical properties. Arabic labels must come from localization.

components.name: Breadcrumb Item
components.packageImport: import { BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/Navigation';
useWhen: A breadcrumb path needs one ancestor, separator, current page, or collapsed menu segment
Each path segment needs semantic list structure for screen readers
A current page must expose aria-current through BreadcrumbPage
avoidWhen: The item is not part of a breadcrumb hierarchy
Primary navigation rows are needed; use Side Nav Item, Top Nav Item, or Navigation Menu
The path segment should trigger an action unrelated to navigation
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.BreadcrumbItem: List item wrapper for a breadcrumb link, current page, separator, or collapsed menu trigger.
props.BreadcrumbLink: Clickable ancestor path segment. Compose with a router link when needed.
props.BreadcrumbPage: Current page path segment. It owns aria-current=page.
props.BreadcrumbSeparator: Visual hierarchy separator. Keep spacing logical and mirror directional separators in RTL.

ai.arabicFriendly: Breadcrumb Item must preserve DOM order, logical spacing, current-page semantics, and mixed-script labels in dir="rtl". Use localized path labels.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.packageImport: import { Breadcrumb, Breadcrumbs, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/Navigation';
useWhen: A breadcrumb path needs the compact ordered-list alias
A component page or app surface needs a full path rendered inside a Breadcrumb landmark
A hierarchy needs multiple Breadcrumb Item children with separators
avoidWhen: A single current page label is enough
The UI needs tabs, side navigation, or top navigation instead of hierarchy context
A progress or wizard path is being represented
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.Breadcrumbs: Compact alias for BreadcrumbList. Use inside Breadcrumb as the ordered list wrapper.
props.children: BreadcrumbItem and BreadcrumbSeparator children in hierarchy order.

ai.arabicFriendly: Breadcrumbs must keep equivalent hierarchy discovery in dir="rtl", including logical spacing, separator treatment, dropdown alignment, and localized labels.

components.name: Bubble
useWhen: Use when the shadcn/ui bubble pattern is required
Use as the Utopia semantic-token wrapper before deeper specialization
Use when AI needs a safe conversion target from shadcn source code
avoidWhen: A more specific Utopia primitive already exists
The behavior requires product-specific copy or data rules
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

components.name: Button
useWhen: Primary actions
Form submissions
Navigation CTAs
avoidWhen: Passive metadata
Decorative labels
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic
Motion that bypasses MotionProvider or prefers-reduced-motion

props.motion: Optional boolean. Defaults to the MotionProvider policy and disables this component pattern when false.
props.contentAlign: Use 'start' for leading-aligned labels, 'center' for the default action layout, or 'between' to pin endContent to the logical inline end.
props.startContent: Optional leading icon or content slot with package-owned alignment.
props.endContent: Optional trailing content slot. With contentAlign='between', it remains pinned while the label truncates.

components.name: Button Group
useWhen: Related actions
Toolbar clusters
Choice-like action sets
Split or overflow action groups with Dropdown Menu
Connected controls that combine buttons, static text, and menu triggers
avoidWhen: Unrelated actions
Primary action stacks
Navigation lists
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic
Hidden overflow menus for primary actions

arabicFriendly: Use logical orientation and preserve action meaning in RTL.
Dropdown overflow triggers require localized aria-label text.
Do not reorder destructive or primary actions only to mirror the visual layout.

components.name: Calendar
useWhen: Date browsing and date picking with visible month/year navigation
Product forms need controlled or uncontrolled selected date state
Month-grid previews need product-owned localization rules and RTL-safe layout
avoidWhen: Hijri calendar without localization requirements
Date math or booking rules that belong in product logic
Unverified locale-specific calendar behavior
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic
Business disabled-date rules inside the design-system package

props.month: Controlled visible month. Pair with onMonthChange.
props.defaultMonth: Initial visible month for uncontrolled usage.
props.selectedDate: Controlled selected date. Pair with onSelect.
props.defaultSelectedDate: Initial selected date for uncontrolled usage.
props.onSelect: Called with a Date when an enabled day is selected.
props.onMonthChange: Called when previous/next or month/year controls change the visible month.
props.weekStartsOn: Use product locale requirements. 0 is Sunday, 1 Monday, 6 Saturday.

ai.arabicFriendly: Calendar supports dir inheritance, localized month/day labels, logical layout, Arabic numerals through Intl, and configurable week start. Hijri support must be explicit product work, not assumed.

components.name: Card
components.packageImport: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardStatus, CardContent, CardFooter } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/Card';
useWhen: A surface needs a clear header, content, and footer contract
Repeated content such as resource cards, product summaries, or dashboard modules
Grouped data where status or secondary action belongs in the header inline-end
Framed tool surfaces that need the Utopia Ceramic hover accent
avoidWhen: Full page sections or marketing bands
Nested cards
Navigation rows that should use SideNavItem, TopNavItem, Breadcrumbs, or List
Clickable behavior without using ClickableCard, SelectableCard, or explicit interactive semantics
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic

props.Card.accent: false | 'hover' | 'always'. Shows the semantic block-start accent line using --primary.
props.Card.interactive: boolean. Adds hover and focus-visible treatment only; use semantic link or button wrappers when the whole card is actionable.
props.CardHeader: Header region. Place CardTitle, CardDescription, and optional CardAction here.
props.CardAction: Header inline-end region for compact actions or CardStatus.
props.CardStatus: Compact status pill that uses badge/control tokens instead of raw colors.
props.CardFooter: Footer region for actions. Uses logical border-block-start and wraps safely.
props.ClickableCard: Anchor wrapper for full-card links. Defaults to hover accent.
props.SelectableCard: Button wrapper for selectable surfaces. Defaults to hover accent and exposes aria-pressed.

ai.arabicFriendly: Card uses logical block/inline layout, puts CardAction at inline-end through CSS grid, supports dir='rtl', tolerates mixed Arabic/English status text, and does not provide production Arabic copy.
ai.shadcnConversion: Keep the shadcn/ui Card family shape but consume Utopia semantic CSS tokens and exports only.

components.name: Carousel
components.packageImport: import { Carousel, CarouselButton, CarouselContent, CarouselControls, CarouselItem } from '@utopia-studio-design/design-system/ShadcnPrimitives';
useWhen: Small sets of related items where order matters
Horizontal browsing that should support wheel, trackpad, touch, and keyboard-friendly focus targets

AI-generated previews that need explicit item labels and replaceable data
avoidWhen: Large data sets
Primary navigation
Content that must all be visible at once
neverInvent: Utopia brand primitives inside reusable component logic
components.arabicFriendly: CarouselContent converts vertical wheel input to inline scrolling, mirrors movement under dir='rtl', hides scrollbars without changing layout width, and requires logical start/end naming for directional controls.
components.shadcnConversion: Keep the shadcn/ui carousel composition shape: Carousel wraps behavior, CarouselContent owns horizontal scroll, CarouselItem owns each replaceable item, and controls remain optional.
